column5: Once per short rest, read the surface thoughts of a creature you can see.
You understand all spoken languages — they reach you as dry whispers.
When a creature lies within 30 ft of you, you feel it as a cold breath.
1/long rest, learn a creature's true name; your next save-forcing effect against it has advantage.
1/long rest, murmur into a humanoid's mind — nudge its next action (WIS negates).
Leave a whisper in a mind you have read; hear through its ears for 1 minute, 1/long rest.
Your thoughts cannot be read. Divination that targets your mind simply fails.
Speak into every mind within 60 ft; each makes a WIS save or obeys one whispered command.
column6: Vecna hears everything you hear until your next long rest.

column5: 1/short rest, see invisible creatures within 30 ft for 1 minute.
You see the wound-state of every creature at a glance — fresh, bloodied, or failing.
1/long rest, see through up to 1 ft of stone or wood for 1 round.
1/long rest, force a reroll of one d20 rolled within 60 ft — you saw it fall wrong.
You cannot be blinded. Darkness is dim light to you.
1/long rest, scry for 10 minutes on a creature you have touched.
When a creature you can see rolls a natural 1, your next roll against it has advantage.
Pluck out your eye; the empty socket sees all — truesight 60 ft for 1 minute, 1/long rest.
column6: Your own eye is gone: −2 to mundane sight Perception. Kas sees you each time you use it.

column5: Creatures you grapple take 1d6 necrotic at the start of their turn.
1/short rest, drag a Medium or smaller creature 10 ft toward you with a gesture.
1/long rest, as a reaction redirect an attack that hit you into an adjacent enemy.
1/short rest, seize a weapon arm from afar — the next attack against you has disadvantage.
Puppet an unconscious or dead body for 1 minute — it walks, gestures, cannot fight.
Your grip counts as magical. +2 to grapple and shove checks.
A creature that fails a save against your control is marked: your next control DC against it is +2.
1/long rest, a killing touch: CON save or the target's hit points are halved; a critical failure drops it to 0.
column6: Your hand blackens for all to see. Divine magic cannot heal you until your next long rest.

column5: Your hits deal +1d6 necrotic damage.
A creature you deal necrotic damage to takes 1d6 again at the start of its next turn.
When an enemy within 30 ft dies, you gain 1d6 temporary hit points.
Nonmagical armor you strike corrodes: −1 AC, once per suit of armor.
1/long rest, blight a 10-ft radius for 1 minute — plants die, healing is halved inside.
Carrion birds and vermin within 60 ft obey your simple commands.
Creatures that start their turn adjacent to you take 1 necrotic. You may still the aura at will.
1/long rest, one creature makes a CON save or takes massive necrotic damage; a humanoid it kills rises as YOUR zombie.
column6: The corruption deepens a step — Kas can smell it. Healing on you is halved until your next long rest.

column5: The dead lend you their voice. Advantage on Intimidation checks.
Your shadow moves a half-beat late. Beasts and commoners will not willingly approach you.
1/short rest, wear the face of someone the target buried — WIS save or frightened 1 round.
Your attacks deal +1d4 damage to frightened creatures.
1/long rest, leave a screaming afterimage where you stood as you move away.
When you drop a creature to 0 HP, enemies within 15 ft make a WIS save or are frightened 1 round.
Creatures frightened of you cannot willingly move closer to you.
1/long rest, a 60-ft cone of shrieking spectral dead: WIS save or 4d8 necrotic and frightened 1 minute.
column6: The dead remember your voice. Undead within 120 ft always know exactly where you are.

column5: You need half the food and water of the living. Poison damage against you is halved.
You no longer need to breathe.
Cast speak with dead once per long rest.
Mend a corpse with a touch — it no longer decays and stays viable for raising.
Raise one Small skeleton servant. It labors, carries and watches; it cannot fight.
1/long rest, when you would drop to 0 hit points, drop to 1 instead.
Critical hits against you become normal hits.
If slain, your soul refuses. You return in 1d10 days at a place of death you know.
column6: Each return you read more as UNDEAD — to detection, and to Kas. Something of you stays behind every time.

column5: When Vecna's compass pulls, you may ask the DM one yes-or-no question. He answers honestly. He always answers.
Undead you raise or command deal +1d6 necrotic on their hits.
